title: Whiteheadia nana
taxonomy: Whiteheadia nana belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a genus of orchids that is endemic to southern Africa. Whiteheadia nana is classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subtribe to which Whiteheadia nana belongs is Orchidinae. This classification helps to group Whiteheadia nana with other related orchid species.
uses: Whiteheadia nana is a plant species found in southern Africa, but limited information is available on its medicinal uses. parts: Whiteheadia nana is a species of plant that has been used in traditional medicine.
